summary: Iteration 9 testing complete. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend dashboard features verified: Expense Breakdown shows donut chart with color-coded legend list (category name + amount), Top Spends section visible with ranked debit descriptions, Top Income Sources section visible with ranked credit descriptions, Accounts section shows Credits/Debits/Balance per account, Monthly Trend title shown for All Time view. Daily Trend logic is implemented for This Month/Last Month periods but no data exists for current month to verify title change.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary returns daily_trend field with day/income/expense structure
Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary returns account_summary field with name/balance/type/credits/debits
Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary returns top_creditors field with description/amount
Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary returns top_debitors field with description/amount
Backend: analytics/summary with date range filters returns period-scoped data
Backend: daily_trend is scoped to date range filter
Backend: account_summary credits/debits are scoped to date range
Backend: top_creditors excludes transfers (no '(from account)' descriptions)
Backend: top_debitors excludes transfers (no '(to account)' descriptions)
Backend: analytics/summary returns all 10 required fields
Backend: analytics/summary requires authentication (401 without auth)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with summary cards (Balance, Income, Expenses, Net Savings, Savings Rate)
Frontend: Expense Breakdown shows donut chart with color-coded legend list below
Frontend: Legend shows category names with amounts (e.g., 'Other ₹2870.3k', 'Health ₹35.9k')
Frontend: Top Spends section visible with ranked list of debit descriptions and amounts
Frontend: Top Income Sources section visible with ranked list of credit descriptions and amounts
Frontend: Accounts section shows Credits/Debits/Balance per account (HDFC Bank: Credits ₹3479325, Debits ₹2976952, Balance ₹602373)
Frontend: Period selector 'All Time' shows 'Monthly Trend' title
Frontend: Period selector works (This Month, Last Month, Custom Range options available)
critical_code_review_comments: Daily Trend title only appears for 'this_month' and 'last_month' periods, not for custom date ranges spanning a single month. This is by design per the requirements.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing transaction data from 2024.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified dashboard analytics enhancements: (1) Backend analytics/summary endpoint now returns 4 new fields: daily_trend (array of {day, income, expense}), account_summary (array of {name, balance, type, credits, debits}), top_creditors (array of {description, amount}), top_debitors (array of {description, amount}). (2) All fields respect date range filters. (3) top_creditors and top_debitors exclude transfers (is_transfer=True). (4) Frontend Dashboard.js displays: Expense Breakdown donut with legend list, Top Spends section, Top Income Sources section, Accounts section with credits/debits. (5) Trend chart title switches between 'Daily Trend' (for this_month/last_month) and 'Monthly Trend' (for all other periods). Test data is from 2024, so current month views show no data.
notes: The Daily Trend feature works correctly - it's designed to show daily data only for 'This Month' and 'Last Month' predefined periods. Custom date ranges always show Monthly Trend regardless of span. This matches the requirements which specifically mention 'This Month' and 'All Time' periods.
